# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our infrastructure, APIs, and open-source packages very seriously. 

If you discover a security vulnerability, please **do NOT report it by opening a public GitHub issue**.

Instead, please report it privately by sending an email to:
📧 **security@dlbr.cloud**

### What to include in your report:
- A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce the issue.
- Any relevant logs or code snippets.

### Response Timeline
- **Acknowledgement**: We will acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report within 48 hours.
- **Triage**: We will review the report and provide an initial assessment within 5 business days.
- **Resolution**: We aim to patch all critical security vulnerabilities within 7 days.

Please allow us time to investigate and patch the issue before making any information public. Thank you for helping keep this project secure!
